ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "uri_reference" TEXT /* A URI Reference that identifies the class */,
  "label" TEXT /* A human-readable label assigned to the class */,
  "status" TEXT /* An indicator of the status of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* A statement of the concept and essential nature of the class */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created the class */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who last modified the class */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was last modified */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the class is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class it belongs to */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language code for the label (e.g., 'en', 'fr') */,
  "label_value" TEXT /* The actual label value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the label was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the label was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of status (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class it belongs to */,
  "description_value" TEXT /* The detailed description value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the description was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the description was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage note */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class it belongs to */,
  "note_value" TEXT /* The text of the usage note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_notes_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class it belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the class definition */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user accessing the class */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser) used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class it pertains to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The text of the comment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship entry */,
  "class_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first class in the relationship */,
  "class_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second class in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, peer) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_relationships_class_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("class_id_1") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_relationships_class_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("class_id_2") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who performed the action */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action taken */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser) used for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_audits_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)
